site.name: MK Studio Pune
site.description: Full-service film production, state-of-the-art equipment rental, professional studio facilities — everything a content creator, filmmaker, or brand needs to produce world-class work.

hero.eyebrow: Pune's Premier Film & Creative Studio — Est. 2008
hero.title: Where Stories
hero.subtitle: Full-service film production, state-of-the-art equipment rental, professional studio facilities — everything a content creator, filmmaker, or brand needs to produce world-class work. Based in Pune. Serving India & the Globe.

services.title: Film Production
services.description: Full-cycle film production for feature films, short films, documentaries, and web series. We handle scripting, casting, shooting, and post-production with seasoned professionals.

services.title: Equipment Rental
services.description: Cinema cameras, DSLR & mirrorless bodies, prime and zoom lenses, lighting rigs, audio gear, and the iconic 12MM Jimmy Crane — on flexible rental plans.

services.title: Recording Studio
services.description: Professional-grade acoustic recording studio for song recording, voice-overs, podcasts, and audio production with expert sound engineers.

services.title: Post-Production
services.description: High-end video and audio editing suites, color grading, VFX, and sound dubbing. Our editors bring cinematic polish to your raw footage.

services.title: Casting & Talent
services.description: Artist management, talent promotion, acting workshops, and open auditions. Connect productions with verified talent.

services.title: Film Marketing
services.description: Strategic multi-platform marketing covering digital media, broadcast, radio, and social networks including OTT placement and theatrical distribution.

equipment.title: Video Cameras
equipment.description: Cinema-grade video cameras for broadcast, documentary, and narrative production.

equipment.title: DSLR & Mirrorless
equipment.description: Full-frame bodies for indie productions, content creators, and music videos.

equipment.title: GoPro & Action Cams
equipment.description: Rugged action cameras for adventure shoots, sports, and POV content.

equipment.title: Prime & Zoom Lenses
equipment.description: Cinematic glass including wide-angle, standard zoom, and short telephoto lenses.

equipment.title: Rigs & Grips
equipment.description: Camera cages, sliders, stabilizers, gimbals, and shoulder rigs.

equipment.title: Lighting
equipment.description: LED panels, fresnel lights, softboxes, and diffusers for pro lighting setups.

equipment.title: Sound Equipment
equipment.description: Boom mics, lavalier kits, audio recorders, mixers, and wireless systems.

equipment.title: 12MM Jimmy Crane
equipment.description: Flagship crane rental for sweeping cinematic shots and high-impact productions.

productions.title: Yoddha
productions.description: A powerful Marathi feature directed by Sushila Prasad, produced by M.K. Dhumal.

productions.title: Jawani Zindabad
productions.description: Directed by Shiv Kadam, featuring Abhishek Sathe and Ketaki Narayan.

productions.title: Lagna Mubarak
productions.description: Comedy drama directed by Chetan Chavada and Sagar Pathak.

productions.title: Sargam
productions.description: Musical drama featuring Dr. Girish Karnad and Yatin Karyekar.

productions.title: Zingar
productions.description: Award-nominated short film exploring human resilience.

productions.title: Bonsai
productions.description: A poetic short about patience, growth, and quiet strength.

productions.title: Jaya
productions.description: Original web series celebrating women's stories.

productions.title: Indrayani Foods
productions.description: Brand campaign for a beloved Maharashtra food brand.

productions.title: Maha Grip
productions.description: High-energy product commercial shoot and post-production.

testimonials.text: MK Studio gave our short film the cinematic look we dreamed of but couldn't afford to build ourselves. The equipment was top-notch and the team's support was invaluable on set.
testimonials.name: Rahul Deshmukh

testimonials.text: Renting the recording studio for our album was seamless. The acoustics are professional-grade and the engineers really understand music. We'll be back for our next project.
testimonials.name: Priya Kulkarni

testimonials.text: We've used MK Studio for three ad film shoots now. The Jimmy Crane rental transformed our client's TV commercial. Highly professional, punctual, and competitively priced.
testimonials.name: Vikram Sharma

about.story: In 2008, visionary filmmaker Machindra Kisan Dhumal founded MK Studio with a conviction that cinema is more than entertainment — it's a force for social awareness, cultural expression, and human connection. From producing award-worthy Marathi feature films to equipping independent content creators with cinema-grade tools, MK Studio has grown into Pune's most versatile creative hub.
about.mission: To democratize professional filmmaking and creative production in India — giving every storyteller, regardless of budget, access to world-class tools and expertise.
